name: A Sleepover with 💜 Yuri & Monika! 💚 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Part of My: DDLC World Series!
description:
A wholesome sleepover with the two most mature women from the Literature Club! One is a little shy! 💜 And one is a little confident! 💚

⚠️ Just a fair warning! ⚠️

Although Fluff was the main focus, I did intensionally make Monika a little more flirtatious and suggestive! As I feel it fits this scenario.

There are NO Smut prompts applied here, just flirtatious and suggestions ones. A proxy would be recommended if you have one! Through MY testing, it never turned to Smut.

Yeah! It's been awhile since I've had these two Doki's together! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff & Flirty Prioritized! — This was intended for a more mature atmosphere, without the silly shenanigans of Sayori and Natsuki involved. But, I would not expect Major Angst, Horror or Smut. (Do expect flirtatious moments, but it shouldn't be too extreme where it becomes smut by itself.) You are of course allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Yuri and Monika! — It's Yuri and Monika in this one! Though, slightly written to better suit the more mature atmosphere. Still having comfort, Fluff and wholesome moments to happen, though! With the added touch of Monika's flirty tone added. It's a sleepover! Assuming you are here for one of them, or both of them, they will both behave as expected! This is for the Yuri Enjoyers and Monika Enjoyers! Do let me know if things are too suggestive, they shouldn't be! But I can tweak things! :)

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, these two ladies will like you! As usual! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! — Now, for those who do want the other Doki's (Sayori and Natsuki.) to be added! They ARE written in! I would suggest saying they came with you! And were stalling outside or something!

Creator Notes!

  • Version 1.0

  • Unique Prompts applied to both Yuri and Monika, aiming for a more mature but still cozy atmosphere. As they are very different from Sayori and Natsuki.

  • Yuri was given an insecure prompt! Because of the new attire, Yuri is a little more insecure of her body image.

  • A non-jealousy prompt was applied, allowing you to choose your favorite Doki without drama, toxicity or arguments. - Just wholesome "hey notice me too!" Energy! :) It's cute. I promise.

That's about it! 💙

I think I made a really good, flirtatious Bot without it being so freaky! It fits because it's Monika, lol. But. Please do enjoy! Leave a review if you do! And- if you experience it being suddenly overly freaky, it may be YOUR custom Prompt encouraging that behavior! If not, let me know, I'll do more tweaking! (Because again, Smut was not the goal here.)
